chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-6212 of 2025 alongwith Const. Petition No. D-6213 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) CP No.D-6212/2025 1. For hearing of CMA No.705/2026 2. For hearing of CMA No.26075/2025 3. For hearing of main case CP No.D-6213/2025 1. For hearing of CMA No.704/2026 2. For hearing of CMA No.26079/2025 3. For hearing of main case 10.02.2026 Mr. Ammar Suria, Associate of Mr. Arshad M. Tayebaly, Advocate for the petitioner Barrister S. Ahsan Ali Shah and Syed Mohsin Ali Shah, Advocates for the respondent ---------------------- At the very outset, learned counsel for the petitioner after arguing the case at some length submits that petitioner will be satisfied if these petitions are disposed of by directing Respondent No.7 to decide appeal(s) as well as stay application(s) of the petitioner strictly in accordance with law. Learned counsel for the respondent records his no objection. Accordingly, these petitions are hereby disposed of alongwith pending applications. Respondents are directed to decide appeal(s) as well as stay application(s) of the petitioner within one month time strictly in accordance with law. Meanwhile, no coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner till the decision of the case by Respondent No.7 as well as no financial embargo shall be placed on the petitioner. Office is directed to place a copy of this order in the connected petition listed above. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
